basics.name: Aadi Patwardhan
basics.label: CS & Engineering Student | Student Researcher
basics.summary: Final-year BSc Computer Science & Engineering (Honours) student at TU Delft, specialising in Data & AI with a minor in Quantum Science & Quantum Information. Student researcher at the Infini Data Lab working on AI-assisted simulation of quantum computation systems. Previously built and shipped a full-stack deal analytics platform at PwC. Passionate about the intersection of machine learning, quantum information theory, and systems engineering.

work.name: TU Delft – Infini Data Lab (WIS)
work.summary: Honours research on efficient simulation of quantum computation systems, focusing on scalability and optimisation through learning-based methods.
highlights: Developing AI-assisted techniques for enabling fault-tolerant quantum computation
Implementing high-performance simulation pipelines in Python/Qiskit for large-scale quantum systems
Research at the intersection of machine learning, quantum information theory, and computational complexity

work.name: PricewaterhouseCoopers (PwC)
work.summary: Architected and deployed a full-stack deal analytics platform in the Advisory Deals division, replacing manual PVA workflows.
highlights: Achieved 4× faster financial analysis by replacing manual PVA workflows
Built backend automation in Python Django and PostgreSQL; deployed with Docker on internal PwC Deals platforms
Developed interactive M&A insight views with React + TypeScript
Prototyped AI-assisted automation tools to streamline deal analysis

awards.title: TU Delft Challenge Runner-Up
awards.summary: Runner-up in the TU Delft challenge track at the Junction Hackathon 2025.

awards.title: Top 3 – CH Challenge
awards.summary: Top 3 nomination for the CH Challenge at HackDelft 2024.

awards.title: Top 10 Nationwide – CanSat Competition
awards.summary: Top 10 nationwide for 3 consecutive years as software & hardware engineer.
